name: frontend-design
description: Frontend design skill for building intentional web interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Design distinct web interfaces with strong visual direction.
interface.longDescription: A skill for frontend interface design that emphasizes typography, visual identity, intentional motion, and non-generic layouts.
defaultPrompt: Design a bold landing page layout for a developer tool.
Create a full page UI concept with clear art direction.
Refine this component to feel less generic and more intentional.
